channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large crater/depression in the road, 29th April
item.description:
Large crater/depression in the road. Previously poorly repaired. Danger to cars and bikes. Needs properly repairing/resurfacing .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swindon Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 29th April
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 29th April
item.description:
ENWD loose, broken and missing dropped kerbs 2760x120mm Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats Cutting and/or concrete fillets may be required (FW Kerbing Defects)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Fences & Barriers problem, 29th April
item.description:
Nwd make safe X2 barriers needed to close gap Give and take Enquiry sent to Ahr (Safety Fence Damage)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes in many areas - shocking road service, 29th April
item.description:
Potholes in many areas - shocking road service. There are numerous potholes and a damaged road surface over an extensive area of Prestbury High St between the junction of Southam Road and the junction with The Bank. It's very dangerous as cars swerve all over the road to avoid the surface damaging their tyres, wheels, and suspension. This is a busy road, and it must be looked at and repaired properly. Not with the usual quick fill of tarmac that disintegrates in a few months, returning the situation to where it was. The road needs a complete resurface. We pay a huge amount in both council tax and road tax. The current situation is a shameful disgrace; it's worse than a 3rd world country.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, High Street, Noverton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
